feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: #CoE#LAL How to set delivery block for a sales order with customer down payment
entry.content: In best practice, after creating a sales order with customer down payment, it should has a block for delivery and it will be removed utill prepayment is received. When this block is missing, how can I set this block in implementation activity?

entry.title: How to Automate Sales Order Quantity Based on Custom Fields in Sales Order Header?
entry.content:
Hello,

How to automate sales order quantity based on data filled in custom fields within the sales order header?

Thank you.

entry.title: Error - profit center or business area is different in the contract and the valuation object
entry.content:
Hi all,

After changing the cost centre and profit centre for a lease contract under Contract Management > Organizational Assignment Rule > Profit Center, we are getting the following error when trying to process the valuation:

"The profit center or business area is different in the contract and the valuation object"

The profit centre for the contract in the error message is still showing the old value. Unsure where this is coming from. Is anyone able to please advise where to go to change this?

Thanks

entry.title: Last Logon Date - Standard API
entry.content:
Hi Team,


   We are trying to create a report for business user details in S4 system, and we found that no standard API uses 'Last Logon Date' as one of the fields.


   We checked API - /QUERYBUSINESSUSERIN, but this one doesn't have LastLogonDate available.


   Right now, we are using standard cds : I_IAMBusinessUserLogonDetails  for 'Last Logon Date' (by creating custom cds view which uses this standard cds internally). , however we wanted to check if there is any standard API for business user which can directly provide this info. 


Thank you in advance.


Regards,


Subhashini Rawat


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Required Approval Workflow Setup for Dispute Management
entry.content:
• A requirement for an approval workflow within the Dispute Management process in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
  • Lack of guidance on setting up the workflow from the SAP Public Cloud test script "Collections and Dispute Management (BFC_US)".

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there a BAPI to Create Automatic Sales Order in Public Cloud with Reference to Sales Contract?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a BAPI that allows for automatic creation of sales orders (with reference to existing sales contracts) in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition? The quantity of sales order can be different from that of sales contract.

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Can we fetch Plant based on Catalog roles / LDAP by using API?
entry.content:
I want to fetch the Plant, CB USER and Roles in API level by using user ldap, is it possible?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create Business Catalog to grant access to Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Dear SAP, 

 

We need to determine whether it is possible in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to create a custom catalog that grants access specifically to a Custom Business Object (CBO). If this is feasible, we require guidance on the process steps.

Thanks! 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Tax payable posting to vendor account
entry.content:
We have a requirement to post Tax Payable from Advance Return for Tax on Sales/Pur. to vendor account. Normally we can configure posting key and vendor account as in the link - https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/tax-payable-posting-to-vendor-account/ba-p/13320535.

However, the posting key cannot be changed to input vendor account within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

Is there any alternative configuration to the above on SAP Public Cloud?

entry.title: PO delivery address
entry.content:
Dear All,

When creating a Purchase Order, I have maintained the company code, plant, and storage location for the purchasing item.

However, I noticed that the delivery address for the PO item differs from the company code address maintained in IMG ("Edit Addresses for Company Codes").

Could you kindly advise if I might have missed any settings, or if there is a need to activate a specific scope in CBC?

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

entry.title: Sourcing and Procurement
entry.content: How to configure when GRN is done then the requisitioner get mail notification in grow with SAP?

entry.title: Creating Status Profile
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I'm looking for a way to create a custom user status profile similar to actions performed via Transaction BS02 in S/4HANA. Is there a provision for this in public cloud? 

Version: SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2502

Regards,

Dexter

entry.title: "Help Needed: Identifying Standard CDS View for Sales Order Version Field (VSNMR_V)"
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project in SAP S/4HANA Cloud and need assistance identifying a standard CDS view that includes the version field for sales orders (field name: VSNMR_V).

I have checked the I_SalesOrder CDS view, but it does not seem to include this field. Could anyone guide me on which standard CDS view contains the VSNMR_V field, or suggest an alternative approach to include this field in a custom CDS view?

Any help or pointers would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you, [Your Name]

entry.title: How to convert already created Regular Employee(BUP003) to Contract Employee(BBP005) or vice-versa
entry.content:
We want to know how to convert already created Regular Employee(BUP003) to Contract Employee(BBP005) or vice-versa.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to mass upload project demands.
entry.content:
Is there any functionality to upload demands for multiple material demands at once through the app 'Manage Project Demands'.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Not to capitalize foreign exchange difference to Asset
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

We have a request from our customer "Not to capitalize the foreign exchange rate difference (PO & Invoice) to fixed assets". In SAP , it is the standard way to capitalize the difference to assets at the time of invoice.

Can we make any expert configurational change to post the foreign exchange rate difference to P&L?

Regards,

Anmol Malhotra

entry.title: Feasibility Check for Restricting Visibility of Pricing Conditions and PPA Terms in Sales Orders.
entry.content:
I am seeking assistance to evaluate the feasibility of restricting the visibility of pricing conditions and other PPA terms, such as net value, to the maker of the sales order.

Details:

  1. Business Requirement:

    • Restrict the visibility of pricing conditions and PPA terms (e.g., net value) to the sales order maker.
    • Ensure that only authorized personnel can view and modify these sensitive details.

  2. Current Challenges:

    • The sales order maker currently has access to all pricing conditions and PPA terms, which may lead to unauthorized changes or data exposure.
    • There is a need to enhance data security and control over sensitive pricing information.

entry.title: Unable extend standard cds view I_WBSElementData_2
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to extend standard cds view in public cloud.

I_WBSElementData_2 

I have checked its details in api.sap.com

But I dont find business context "Appl Interface WBSElement Details (PS_WBSELEMENT)" in public cloud.

Can you please help on this? Any idea how can we extend this cds?

Regards,

Jagadhatri

ABAP Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: S4 HANA Public Cloud - API to read Storage Locations
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to replicate Storage Locations data from S4 HANA cloud to third party application via SAP CPI.
We explored the APIs available in API HUB but did not find anything to read the required data (Plant, Storage Location ID, Storage Location Name).
How do I get this information?

Is there any API for this?

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Automatic Payment Approval and Payment Voucher
entry.content:
Dear All 

We are using SAP Public Cloud and requirement is to print the payments vouchers and also having an approval process.

Not having license for SAP Bank Communication Management hence App Approve Bank Payment is not available.

Is there any option to enable , to print the payment vouchers like through Create Correspondence App, standard available correspondence types not having option to print payment vouchers.

Secondly is there any possibility/workaround to approve the payments before actually posting those through Manage Automatic Payment or Post Outgoing Payment App.
